<!-- Small, well-gated PRs get the fastest reviews. -->

- [ ] `make lint test contract` passes locally
- [ ] Tests ship in this PR (incl. an `integration`-tagged case for new operations)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` entry added (user-visible changes)
- [ ] Surface changes were agreed in an issue first (see CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] Observed API divergence? Ledger entry added to API_NOTES.md
